best_per_strategy.name: pair_spread_4h_fast_cycle_btcusdt_ethusdt_1.6_0.35
best_per_strategy.notes: Rolling-beta spread z-score with bounded turnover/correlation guardrails 4h uses fast_cycle tuning to balance participation, stability, and PBO.

notes.local_data_gap: Requested OOS through 2026-03-08T23:59:59.999000+00:00 inclusive, but local on-disk market data ends on 2026-03-07T10:00:00+00:00, so the suite clamps to the actual last available timestamp.
notes.candidate_pool_policy: Strict promoted strategies stay primary. If none are promoted, keep provisional shortlist candidates that either beat BTC on the validation month or deliver at least 2% in each of the latest three months.
notes.manual_profile: Use a higher-timeframe/core-symbol profile when RAM is constrained; this run reports only the explicitly requested symbol/timeframe slice.
